description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a prominent gable roof and a symmetrical front facade. The front features a covered porch with white columns, steps leading up to the main entry, and a landscaped garden with shrubs and small trees. The property includes a driveway leading to a garage on one side and a fenced backyard with a patio, pool, and additional greenery. Windows are arranged in neat, symmetrical rows on both floors, and the exterior walls are finished in a light color with contrasting trim. The backyard is enclosed by a wooden fence, providing privacy and a defined outdoor living space. The house sits adjacent to a paved street, with a sidewalk and curb visible at the front.
description: A two-story suburban house with a gable roof, covered porch, garage, and a landscaped backyard featuring a pool and patio. The exterior is light-colored with symmetrical windows and a fenced yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch with columns, main entry steps, landscaped front yard, and driveway leading to the garage.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and the transition from the front yard to the backyard with visible fencing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fenced backyard, patio, pool, and lush landscaping, as well as the back facade of the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side yard, additional windows, and the continuation of the fence enclosing the backyard.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with steps, covered porch supported by white columns, and decorative trim.
